data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Guide assignment'.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the 'Guide assignment' requirement. While there are multiple bookings and customer interactions documented, none of the evidence directly addresses whether a guide has been assigned to the tours or how this assignment is managed. Therefore, without concrete evidence or checks related to guide assignment, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the assignment of guides to tours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for guide assignment validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks to verify if guides are assigned to the tours.
